_comment: HAND-MAINTAINED INPUT (NOT generated) — the slow-moving SAK facts that the dashboard renderer (scripts/render-sak-dashboard.py) cannot derive from other committed in-repo files. The renderer pulls the leading-indicator registry (specs/leading-indicators.v1.json) and the coverage-map projection (specs/lineage/coverage-map.json) live from their committed specs; everything THOSE files cannot answer — current phase status, the SAK Phase-4 advisory->blocking state-machine position, the cost ledger (029-DR-BAND is prose, not machine-readable), and the SAK bead-subtree counts (the canonical bead store is the gitignored umbrella ~/000-projects/.beads/, unreadable from this repo / CI) — is captured here. Refresh this file (then regenerate the dashboard) from the SAK cron action or by hand when phase / state / cost / bead facts change. The dashboard is DERIVED: never hand-edit SAK-DASHBOARD.md; edit this file and run `python3 scripts/render-sak-dashboard.py`. Authority: 000-docs/033-PP-PLAN-skill-refiner-sak-amendment-v7-2026-05-28.md § 14.13.1.

phases.detail: skill-frontmatter walking skeleton (base + overlay + composition) landed; deep-capture -> base/overlay schema -> drift-watch -> classify -> reconcile pattern exists end-to-end

phases.phase: Phase 1 — six contracts + P0 safety spine
phases.detail: P0 safety spine COMPLETE (8/8 backbone children closed 2026-06-12): typed fetch-failure taxonomy + 3 append-only tiers (doc 052), frozen drift-classification/v1 eval set with recall-floor write gate (doc 053), append-only lineage log + derived coverage map (doc 054), deterministic classifier walls (doc 055), 6767-h prose-anchor validity gate, watcher waves 1+2 + FF#2. P1 siblings (.9-.13) remain
first of three staged consumer cutovers (.14 internal validators -> .15 j-rig -> .17 CCP, blast-radius ascending); gated behind the Phase 1 P1 siblings
CCP authority-flip soak window NO-GO as of 2026-06-18 (1.16% deviation); matures ~2026-07-11; requires CTO+CISO+VP-DevRel triple sign-off + ISEDC Class-1 charter (044-AT-DECR)

state_machine.next_gate: CCP authority-flip soak >= 99.5% / >= 30d / zero-P0 / rollback-rehearsed / triple sign-off / 14d notice (DR-049); soak matures ~2026-07-11

cost_ledger._comment: Bandwidth model is FTE-week, not dollars (Intent Solutions is a sole-prop; 029-DR-BAND replaced plan 027's dollar/calendar budgets with an FTE-day model). Figures mirror 029-DR-BAND § 2 + § 3 aggregate.

bead_state._comment: Counts of the SAK / Skill-Refiner bead subtree under epic bd_000-projects-9k5h, captured from the canonical umbrella bd workspace (~/000-projects/.beads/) which is gitignored and unreadable from this repo / CI. Refresh via: bd list --label <label> --json --limit 500 from /home/jeremy/000-projects. Captured 2026-06-20.
